---
title: Bundled Themes
description: List of included themes
---

zlaunch includes 15 bundled themes.

<img src="/img/themes-gallery.webp" alt="A selection of bundled themes" />

| Theme | Style |
|-------|-------|
| `ayu-dark` | Warm, soft colors |
| `catppuccin-latte` | Light pastel |
| `catppuccin-mocha` | Dark pastel |
| `dracula` | Purple-accented dark |
| `everforest` | Green-tinted forest |
| `gruvbox-dark` | Warm retro dark |
| `kanagawa` | Japanese wave colors |
| `material` | Material design dark |
| `monokai` | Classic code theme |
| `nord` | Arctic blue tones |
| `one-dark` | Atom editor theme |
| `rose-pine` | Muted warm pink |
| `solarized-dark` | High contrast dark |
| `synthwave` | Retro neon |
| `tokyo-night` | Cool night colors |

## Applying a Theme

<Tabs items={['Config', 'CLI']}>
<Tab value="Config">

```toml
# In ~/.config/zlaunch/config.toml
theme = "catppuccin-mocha"
```

</Tab>
<Tab value="CLI">

```bash
zlaunch theme set catppuccin-mocha
```

Changes apply immediately.

</Tab>
</Tabs>

## Previewing Themes

Use the themes mode to quickly preview:

```bash
zlaunch show --modes themes
```

Search for a theme name and press Enter to apply it.

<Callout type="info">
Theme changes are instant—no restart needed.
</Callout>
